title: ODFM-041 You Show Me Your Wet Hair For The First Time #26 Nana Wakui
overview: After having her back washed away, I carefully wash her beautiful body and slowly soak in the spacious cypress bath. When I was pouring hot water while touching my body, she reached out to my sensitive part this time. Immediately, first in the bath. And after you've calmed down a bit, let's take your time and savor you until the night is over, no, until the dawn, after you've changed into a lustrous yukata.
